title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
